observations.summary: A comprehensive guide to the runx harness testing system. The repo includes a detailed README explaining SKILL.md contracts, X.yaml test cases, fixtures, sealed receipts, and the publish-verify loop. It also contains a complete working skill (example-validator) with all required files and a sample fixture.
observations.audience: Developers building, testing, and publishing runx skills who need to understand the harness workflow and how to create verifiable, receipt-producing skills
observations.why_allowed: GitHub is a durable public platform where open-source technical tutorials and code examples are explicitly encouraged. The content is original, specific to runx, and provides real value to developers evaluating or using the runx ecosystem.

summary: Created public GitHub repo umbtest03/runx-harness-guide with a comprehensive walkthrough of the runx harness system including real SKILL.md, X.yaml, runner, and fixture files plus a complete working example skill.
